Part.Source:
parm(in:&inEmpCod, in:&inImpFilCod, in:&inImpUfeCod, in:&inImpLctCod, in:&inImpGruImpCod, in:&inImpCatCod);
prompt(PromptobservacoesNota, &EmpCod, &ObsCod);

Event Start &EmpCod = &inEmpCod &ImpFilCod = &inImpFilCod &ImpUfeCod = &inImpUfeCod &ImpLctCod = &inImpLctCod &ImpGruImpCod = &inImpGruImpCod &ImpCatCod = &inImpCatCod RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &FilRegTrib, &CIMpOriUfeCod) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Atencao.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ImpRedAlqIcmExt.TooltipText = "Redução na Base de Cálculo do ICMS S.T." &ImpAlqIcmExt.TooltipText = "Alíquota do ICMS S.T (Estado Destino)" &ImpRedAlqIcmInt.TooltipText = "Redução na Base de Cálculo do ICMS" &ImpAlqIcmInt.TooltipText = "Alíquota do ICMS (Estado Origem)" &ImpAlqinss.TooltipText = "Código Beneficio Fiscal." &ImpCBenef.TooltipText = "Código Beneficio Fiscal." Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &ImpCstCofins = NF_CstCofins.COF99 &ImpCstPis = NF_CstPIS.CST99 EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota &gridObsCod = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod &gridObsNom = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsNom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &ActionDelete = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionar' &ObsNom = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ObsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ObsCod = &ObsCod &IsAchou = false For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota If &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = &ObsCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtObservacaoNotaItem = new() &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = ObsCod &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsNom = ObsNom &sdtObservacaoNota.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) EndIF When none &ObsNom = 'OBSERVACAO NAO LOCALIZADA!' msg('Observação não Localizada!') EndFor grid.Refresh() &ObsCod.setfocus() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ImpFilCod.ControlValueChanged RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &FilRegTrib, &CIMpOriUfeCod) EndEvent Event &ActionDelete.Click For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota If &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = &gridObsCod &index = &sdtObservacaoNota.IndexOf(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) &sdtObservacaoNota.Remove(&index) EndiF EndFor grid.Refresh() &ObsCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Enter RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &TbFilRegTrib, &UFOrigem) Do Case Case &ImpLctCod.IsEmpty() msg('Selecione Tipo Operação!') &ImpLctCod.SetFocus() Otherwise AtualizaGravaTabelaImposto.Call(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &ImpLctCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpGruImpCod, &ImpCatCod, &UFOrigem, &ImpAlqMVA, &impAlqIcmInt, &ImpRedAlqIcmInt, &ImpAlqIcmExt, &ImpRedAlqIcmExt, &ImpDif, &ImpCofins, &ImpPis, &ImpIPI, &CImpCstCod, &ImpCBenef, &ImpIcmsMotDes, &IsImpIcmsMotDes, &ImpCfoCod, &ImpCstCofins, &ImpCstPis, &ImpCstIpi, &sdtObservacaoNota, &IsAtualizarCfop, &IsAtualizarSit, &IsAtualizarCBenef, &IsAtualizarAlqInt, &IsAtualizarRedAlqInt, &IsAtualizarAlqExt, &IsAtualizarRedAlqExt, &IsAtualizarMVA, &IsAtualizarDif, &IsAtualizarPIS, &IsAtualizarCstIpi, &IsAtualizarCOFIN, &IsAtualizarIPI, &IsAtualizarCSTPIS, &IsAtualizarCSTCOFINS, &IsAtualizarObs, &IsAtualizarImpALqIcmUFDest, &ImpALqIcmUFDest, &IsImpPisRed, &ImpPisRed, &IsImpCofinsRed, &ImpCofinsRed, &IsAtualizarFecop, &ImpTaxFecop, &IsAtualizarINSS, &ImpAlqinss, &Context.UserName) msg('Processo executado com Sucesso!') EndCase EndEvent
